zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley於1150年之前與Richard Eley在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley于1150年之前与Richard Eley在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Eley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the medieval personal name Eligius (see Eligio ), a Christian saint's name.

variants.name: Ely
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley married Richard Eley before 1150, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley a épousé Richard Eley avant 1150, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley hat vor 1150 in England Richard Eley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley lei sposato Richard Eley prima del 1150, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eleyは1150年以前にイギリスでRichard Eleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley(은)는 1150년 이전 영국에서 Richard Eley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley casou-se com Richard Eley antes 1150, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Eley перед 1150 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Eley se casó con Richard Eley antes de 1150, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
